'''Lumiya's fleet''' was a fleet of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] starships controlled by [[Lumiya]] at the time of the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] and its immediate aftermath. She used it to enforce her will as a [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] and claimant [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lady of the Sith]], giving support to the [[Tof/Legends|Tof]] and to the aspirations of [[Carnor Jax]]. During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], her fleet battled the [[Yuuzhan Vong|invaders]] to a standstill at the [[Battle of Yaga Minor (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Yaga Minor]]. The fleet was lost sometime during the war.

==Appearances==
